The Art Deco design period spanned from 1920 to 1940.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?start ?end WHERE {
  wd:Q173782 wdt:P571 ?start ; wdt:P572 ?end .
}
```
